title: Vintage Vibes
description: Adds vintage themed decor to the game!
body:
Vintage Vibes is a mod for Minecraft 1.20.1 that aims to add content that fits the vibe of old museums and vintage art prints! Release content features a wide range of things, but mostly focuses on a tropical theme.

Content:

Colorful Butterflies that can be bottled up for transport
10 different collectable Masks
16 types of Decorative Gems
A different Paper Lantern for every wood type
A wide range of Flowers
Delicious Pineapples
And Chiseled Sandstone, featuring a variety of strange and familiar faces

Join my Discord using the link below, and stay tuned for more content and other projects!
https://discord.gg/Pb4vWM6Nhy
